## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run \wikirecall ...2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11]
- **Bun version**: [e.g. 1.1.0]
- **WikiRecall version**: [e.g. 0.1.0]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or log output here.
